args:
set -eu
doctor_json=$(mktemp)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- doctor --format json > "$doctor_json"
python3 - "$doctor_json" <<'PY'
import json, sys
obj = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
assert obj['operating_system'] == 'Linux'
assert obj['accelerator_vendor'] == 'Nvidia'
assert obj['gpu_arches'] == ['sm90']
assert obj['cuda_version'] == '12.4'
assert obj['driver_version'] == '550.54'
assert obj['python_abi'] == 'cp311'
assert obj['libc_abi'].startswith('glibc-')
PY
printf 'doctor-host-snapshot\n'
